role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types (Eucalyptus, broadleaf) and biomes.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road markings, shoulders, and utility pole infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on cross-domain synthesis, specifically Google Street View camera artifacts and regional infrastructure standards.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The agents adhered to their roles, though the botanics agent hallucinated a specific plant species. The meta agent provided the strongest differentiating evidence (utility pole design and camera artifacts), which the judge correctly prioritized to win the final match against Colombia.

botanics: claimed 'presence of Eucalyptus (visible in the mid-ground)' — the tree in the mid-ground is not clearly identifiable as Eucalyptus and appears to be a generic broadleaf tree.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described lush vegetation and rolling hills.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: The claim of visible Eucalyptus is not supported by the image resolution/content.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the concrete poles and road markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the image artifacts (blur) and pole style.
